prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "鸟狗平衡" (bird-dog balance) exercise, side view, facing right. Person posture: Athletic person at the top of a bird-dog hold: in a quadruped position with hands flat on the ground directly under the shoulders and knees on the ground directly under the hips; the right arm extended forward parallel to the floor with the hand at shoulder height; the left leg extended straight backward parallel to the floor with the foot at hip height, so that right arm, torso, and left leg form one straight horizontal line; spine neutral, hips and shoulders level (no rotation), core braced; plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: erector spinae (back muscles along the spine) and gluteus maximus of the extended (left) leg. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: deep core (transverse abdominis) and shoulder stabilizers (rotator cuff and serratus anterior) of the extended arm. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "竖脊肌" pointing to the erector spinae; "臀大肌" pointing to the gluteus maximus of the extended leg; "核心 / 肩袖" pointing to the core and rotator cuff stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
